recommendations.action: Accept WAIVED posture — four P2 ACs cover a configuration-surface substrate story with no live test runner. AC 1 + AC 4 have STRONG substrate evidence: Task 6 six-smoke bundle covers static JSON validity (smoke 1), `$schema` + `extends: config:recommended` (smoke 2), 4-packageRules + groupName-sort partition + top-level `automerge: false` (smoke 3), I7 `rangeStrategy: pin` invariance across all 4 entries (smoke 4), 22-invariant manifest-load (smoke 5), and sync-gate clean (smoke 6). All six smokes re-verified LIVE at iter-85 trace-time. AC 2 + AC 3 are downstream consumer ACs explicitly carved out of Story 1.15 scope; Renovate GitHub App (Mend-hosted; post-M0 ops install) + Epic 13 integration-test CI gate + downstream consumer stories that install OTEL / Vitest / Radix UI are the runtime consumers. Per-AC runner-hosted coverage deferred to Story 1.16.

Story 1.15 authors the Renovate I7 policy config substrate as a contract (drift-detected by Story 1.9 sync-gate via 2 new manifest entries `INV-deps-version-pinning` + `INV-renovate-rationale` at content-hash level). Any silent edit to `.github/renovate.json` or `docs/invariants/renovate.md` triggers sync-gate FAIL at pre-commit. Renovate GitHub App (when installed) + Epic 13 integration-test CI gate consume this contract at runtime; until the App is installed no Renovate PR is emitted (zero runtime behaviour at Story 1.15 substrate stage — consistent with AC 1 Renovate-GitHub-App-install + AC 2 + AC 3 scope carve-outs).

Story 1.16 test-runner will unlock optional per-AC probes: AC 1 JSON-schema validation against Renovate canonical config schema (`$schema` reference at config top; `npx renovate-config-validator .github/renovate.json`); AC 2 `automerge: false` posture unit test + per-group default-preservation assertion; AC 3 Renovate-runtime grouping unit test with fixture workspace + 3 OTEL packages; AC 4 Zod `InvariantSchema` parse + contentHash parity + anchor resolution (already covered by `pnpm keel-invariants:check` — smoke 6 is Story 1.16's future probe at substrate already running). None of these block Story 1.15 `review → done` transition.
Run /bmad-testarch-test-review to assess test quality (no tests exist — no-op; recorded for parity with downstream pipelines).
